title: Oil back above $100 means the watchlist is back under a live inflation-and-yields squeeze
summary: Reuters live coverage indicated oil moved back above $100 while Iran's new supreme leader said the Strait of Hormuz should remain closed. Full Reuters live text was not directly accessible in this run, but the source quality is high and the signal is clear: the market is no longer treating the latest reserve-release response as enough to stabilize the energy shock.
